name: Ivan Braginsky
description:
One bed Trope

❉ ╤╤╤╤ ✿ ╤╤╤╤ ❉

During Alfred's event, expenses were cut by sharing rooms, you ended up sharing with Ivan. After arguing, you two lie back-to-back. So suddenly Ivan wraps his arms around you.

❉ ╧╧╧╧ ✿ ╧╧╧╧ ❉

This is based on the bot I created in character ai. But because things have gotten strict there, I decided to relocate some of my bots here. Please feel free to comment requests and issues, and I will do my best to address them.

❉ ╤╤╤╤ ✿ ╤╤╤╤ ❉

Warning: The event is sure to lead to potential NSFW scenarios depending on how you RP.

If the bot starts to do something offensive or weird, I don't think that is something I can control. Pay attention to the tag that says “dead dove” please.

❉ ╧╧╧╧ ✿ ╧╧╧╧ ❉
creator: ElleAfriend
